vision_profile.current_state: Aarav is a Backend Engineer with 6 years of experience, proficient in Java, Spring Boot, and databases.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest obstacle is a perceived lack of depth in system design, distributed systems, and cloud architecture, which he fears will hinder his senior engineering interviews.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to transition into a senior backend role to gain ownership over larger engineering decisions and move beyond simply executing assigned tasks.

milestones.label: L1
milestones.identity_statement: You grasp core system design principles and can articulate architectural trade-offs.

modules.title: Core System Design Concepts
modules.description: Understand the fundamental concepts, goals, and challenges of designing large-scale systems.

skills.title: System Design Goals & Trade-offs
skills.description: Learn the primary objectives of system design and how to evaluate trade-offs between different architectural choices.

scenario.title: Analyzing Design Requirements for a New Feature

skills.title: Functional vs. Non-Functional Requirements
skills.description: Differentiate between functional requirements (what a system does) and non-functional requirements (how well it does it).

scenario.title: Identifying NFRs for an E-commerce Platform

skills.title: Scalability & Performance Metrics
skills.description: Learn to define and measure scalability and performance using key metrics like latency, throughput, and concurrency.

scenario.title: Calculating QPS and Latency for a Web Service

skills.title: Availability & Reliability Concepts
skills.description: Grasp the concepts of system availability, reliability, and fault tolerance, including Nines of Availability.

scenario.title: Designing for High Availability in a Payment Gateway

modules.title: Common Architectural Styles
modules.description: Explore foundational architectural patterns like Monoliths, Microservices, and their use cases.

skills.title: Monolithic Architecture
skills.description: Understand the structure, advantages, and disadvantages of monolithic applications.

scenario.title: Evaluating a Monolith for a Startup

skills.title: Introduction to Microservices
skills.description: Get an overview of microservices architecture, its benefits, and common challenges.

scenario.title: Deciding Between Monolith and Microservices

skills.title: Client-Server & Peer-to-Peer Models
skills.description: Understand fundamental interaction models in distributed systems.

scenario.title: Choosing a Model for a File Sharing Application

skills.title: Layered Architecture
skills.description: Explore the classic layered architecture pattern and its application in system design.

scenario.title: Designing a Simple Web Application with Layers

modules.title: Data Storage Fundamentals
modules.description: Learn about different database types and their suitability for various system design challenges.

skills.title: SQL vs. NoSQL Databases
skills.description: Compare relational (SQL) and non-relational (NoSQL) databases, understanding their strengths and weaknesses.

scenario.title: Choosing a Database for a Social Media App

skills.title: Database Sharding & Replication
skills.description: Explore techniques for distributing and duplicating data across multiple database instances for scalability and fault tolerance.

scenario.title: Designing a Sharding Strategy for User Data

skills.title: Caching Strategies
skills.description: Understand different caching mechanisms (e.g., in-memory, distributed) and when to apply them to improve performance.

scenario.title: Implementing a Cache for a Product Catalog

skills.title: CAP Theorem Basics
skills.description: Learn the fundamental CAP theorem and its implications for designing distributed data stores.

scenario.title: Applying CAP Theorem to a Distributed System

milestones.label: L2
milestones.identity_statement: You can identify bottlenecks in existing systems and propose effective scaling solutions.

modules.title: Horizontal Scaling Techniques
modules.description: Dive into techniques for scaling web applications horizontally, including load balancing and stateless services.

skills.title: Load Balancing Algorithms
skills.description: Understand various load balancing algorithms (e.g., Round Robin, Least Connections) and their use cases.

scenario.title: Choosing a Load Balancer for High Traffic

skills.title: Reverse Proxies & CDNs
skills.description: Learn how reverse proxies and Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) enhance performance and security.

video.title: Proxies and CDNs in Web Architecture

scenario.title: Optimizing Static Content Delivery with CDN

skills.title: Stateless vs. Stateful Services
skills.description: Differentiate between stateless and stateful services and their implications for distributed system design.

scenario.title: Converting a Stateful Service to Stateless

skills.title: Session Management in Distributed Systems
skills.description: Learn various strategies for managing user sessions across multiple servers in a distributed environment.

scenario.title: Designing Session Handling for a Scalable Web App

modules.title: Ensuring Data Integrity
modules.description: Understand how to maintain data consistency and availability across distributed data stores.

skills.title: ACID vs. BASE Properties
skills.description: Compare ACID (Atomicity, Consistency, Isolation, Durability) and BASE (Basically Available, Soft state, Eventually consistent) properties for databases.

scenario.title: Choosing Consistency for a Financial Application

skills.title: Data Replication Strategies
skills.description: Explore different methods of data replication (e.g., master-slave, multi-master) and their trade-offs.

scenario.title: Designing a Highly Available Database Cluster

skills.title: Eventual Consistency Models
skills.description: Understand eventual consistency, its implications, and how it's managed in distributed systems.

scenario.title: Handling Data Inconsistencies in a Shopping Cart

skills.title: Distributed Transactions (2PC, Saga)
skills.description: Explore challenges and patterns for managing transactions across multiple services (Two-Phase Commit, Saga pattern).

scenario.title: Designing a Distributed Order Processing System

modules.title: Introduction to Message Queues
modules.description: Explore the role of message queues in decoupling services and handling asynchronous operations, with a focus on Kafka-like principles.

skills.title: Why Message Queues?
skills.description: Understand the benefits of using message queues for asynchronous communication, decoupling, and resilience.

scenario.title: Decoupling Services with a Message Queue

skills.title: Publish-Subscribe Pattern
skills.description: Learn the publish-subscribe pattern as a core concept for event-driven architectures.

scenario.title: Implementing a Notification System with Pub-Sub

skills.title: Message Brokers (e.g., Kafka concepts)
skills.description: Understand the role of message brokers in implementing message queues, with an introduction to Kafka's core ideas.

scenario.title: Designing a Simple Event Stream with Kafka Principles

skills.title: Idempotency & Message Ordering
skills.description: Address critical concerns in message processing: ensuring operations are idempotent and maintaining message order.

scenario.title: Ensuring Idempotent Payments in a Queue

milestones.label: L3
milestones.identity_statement: You design robust distributed systems, understanding inter-service communication and data flow.

modules.title: Microservices Communication
modules.description: Master various communication patterns between microservices, including synchronous and asynchronous methods.

skills.title: RESTful APIs for Microservices
skills.description: Deep dive into designing and implementing RESTful APIs for effective microservice communication.

scenario.title: Designing a REST API for a User Service

skills.title: gRPC & Protocol Buffers
skills.description: Explore gRPC as an alternative to REST for high-performance inter-service communication using Protocol Buffers.

scenario.title: Migrating a REST Endpoint to gRPC

skills.title: Event-Driven Communication
skills.description: Understand how event-driven architectures facilitate loose coupling and scalability in microservices.

scenario.title: Designing an Event-Driven Order Fulfillment System

skills.title: Service Discovery Mechanisms
skills.description: Learn how services locate and communicate with each other in a dynamic microservices environment.

scenario.title: Implementing Service Discovery for a New Microservice

modules.title: Advanced Kafka Architecture Concepts
modules.description: Delve deeper into Kafka's architecture, components, and best practices for building event streaming platforms.

skills.title: Kafka Producers & Consumers
skills.description: Understand how Kafka producers send messages and consumers read them, including configuration and guarantees.

video.title: Kafka Producers and Consumers Deep Dive

scenario.title: Designing a High-Throughput Kafka Producer

skills.title: Kafka Topics, Partitions & Brokers
skills.description: Gain a deep understanding of Kafka's core components: topics, partitions, and brokers, and how they enable scalability.

scenario.title: Designing a Kafka Topic for Log Aggregation

skills.title: Zookeeper's Role in Kafka
skills.description: Understand how Apache Zookeeper is used by Kafka for distributed coordination and metadata management.

scenario.title: Troubleshooting a Kafka Cluster Issue

skills.title: Stream Processing with Kafka Streams (conceptual)
skills.description: Get an overview of stream processing concepts and how Kafka Streams can be used for real-time data transformations.

scenario.title: Designing a Real-time Fraud Detection System

modules.title: Monitoring & Logging Distributed Systems
modules.description: Learn how to effectively monitor, log, and trace requests across complex distributed architectures.

skills.title: Centralized Logging
skills.description: Understand the importance of centralized logging and common tools/patterns (e.g., ELK stack concepts).

scenario.title: Setting up a Log Aggregation System

skills.title: Distributed Tracing
skills.description: Learn how distributed tracing helps visualize request flows across multiple services to debug performance issues.

scenario.title: Debugging a Latency Spike with Distributed Tracing

skills.title: Metrics & Alerting
skills.description: Define key metrics for system health and performance, and set up effective alerting strategies.

scenario.title: Defining Alerts for Critical Service Health

skills.title: Health Checks & Dashboards
skills.description: Implement health checks for services and design informative dashboards for operational visibility.

scenario.title: Designing a Comprehensive Service Dashboard

milestones.label: L4
milestones.identity_statement: You design systems that are fault-tolerant, highly available, and can gracefully handle failures.

modules.title: Building Fault-Tolerant Systems
modules.description: Implement design patterns to ensure your distributed systems remain robust in the face of failures.

skills.title: Circuit Breaker Pattern
skills.description: Learn to implement the Circuit Breaker pattern to prevent cascading failures in distributed systems.

scenario.title: Implementing a Circuit Breaker for an External API Call

skills.title: Bulkhead Pattern
skills.description: Understand how the Bulkhead pattern isolates failures to prevent them from affecting the entire system.

scenario.title: Applying Bulkhead to a Multi-Tenant Application

skills.title: Retry & Timeout Mechanisms
skills.description: Implement robust retry and timeout strategies to handle transient failures in distributed systems.

scenario.title: Configuring Retries for a Database Connection

skills.title: Rate Limiting & Throttling
skills.description: Learn to implement rate limiting and throttling to protect services from overload and abuse.

scenario.title: Designing a Rate Limiter for an API Gateway

modules.title: Securing & Managing APIs
modules.description: Design and implement API Gateways for managing, securing, and routing requests to microservices.

skills.title: API Gateway Design
skills.description: Understand the role and design considerations for API Gateways in a microservices architecture.

scenario.title: Choosing an API Gateway for a Microservices Ecosystem

skills.title: Authentication & Authorization
skills.description: Master the concepts of authentication (who you are) and authorization (what you can do) in distributed systems.

scenario.title: Implementing Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)

skills.title: OAuth2 & JWT (conceptual)
skills.description: Get a conceptual understanding of OAuth2 for delegated authorization and JSON Web Tokens (JWT) for secure information exchange.

scenario.title: Integrating Third-Party Login with OAuth2

skills.title: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS)
skills.description: Understand CORS and how to configure it to allow secure cross-origin requests.

scenario.title: Troubleshooting a CORS Error in a Frontend App

modules.title: Advanced Data Management
modules.description: Explore advanced techniques for data partitioning, consistency, and conflict resolution in distributed databases.

skills.title: Consistent Hashing
skills.description: Learn Consistent Hashing for efficient data distribution and minimal rebalancing in distributed caches and databases.

scenario.title: Designing a Distributed Cache with Consistent Hashing

skills.title: Conflict Resolution Strategies
skills.description: Explore techniques for resolving data conflicts that arise in eventually consistent distributed databases.

scenario.title: Handling Concurrent Edits in a Collaborative Document

skills.title: Data Lakes & Data Warehouses (conceptual)
skills.description: Get a conceptual understanding of data lakes and data warehouses for large-scale data storage and analytics.

scenario.title: Designing a Data Platform for Business Intelligence

skills.title: Change Data Capture (CDC)
skills.description: Understand Change Data Capture (CDC) as a technique for tracking and propagating database changes in real-time.

scenario.title: Implementing CDC for a Data Warehouse Update

milestones.label: L5
milestones.identity_statement: You design and optimize systems for cloud environments, leveraging cloud-agnostic deployment patterns.

modules.title: Containerization & Orchestration
modules.description: Understand the principles of containerization and how orchestration platforms manage distributed applications.

skills.title: Docker Fundamentals (conceptual)
skills.description: Get a conceptual overview of Docker, containers, and their benefits for application packaging and deployment.

scenario.title: Containerizing a Spring Boot Application

skills.title: Kubernetes Concepts (conceptual)
skills.description: Understand the core concepts of Kubernetes for orchestrating containerized applications at scale.

scenario.title: Deploying a Microservice to a Kubernetes Cluster

skills.title: Microservices Deployment Patterns
skills.description: Explore various patterns for deploying microservices, including sidecar, ambassador, and adapter patterns.

scenario.title: Implementing a Sidecar for Logging in a Microservice

skills.title: Blue/Green & Canary Deployments
skills.description: Learn advanced deployment strategies like Blue/Green and Canary deployments for zero-downtime releases.

scenario.title: Planning a Blue/Green Deployment for a Critical Service

modules.title: Event-Driven & Serverless Design
modules.description: Explore serverless computing and advanced event-driven patterns for highly scalable and cost-effective solutions.

skills.title: Serverless Computing Concepts
skills.description: Understand the principles of serverless architectures, Function-as-a-Service (FaaS), and their benefits.

scenario.title: Designing a Serverless Image Processing Pipeline

skills.title: Event Sourcing Pattern
skills.description: Learn the Event Sourcing pattern for persisting application state as a sequence of immutable events.

scenario.title: Implementing Event Sourcing for an Account Ledger

skills.title: Command Query Responsibility Segregation (CQRS)
skills.description: Understand CQRS as a pattern to separate read and write operations for improved scalability and performance.

scenario.title: Applying CQRS to an E-commerce Product Catalog

skills.title: Saga Pattern for Distributed Transactions
skills.description: Deep dive into the Saga pattern for managing long-running distributed transactions in microservices.

scenario.title: Designing a Saga for a Travel Booking System

modules.title: Cloud-Agnostic Deployment Strategies
modules.description: Learn common deployment patterns and best practices for building resilient and scalable applications in cloud environments.

skills.title: Multi-Region & Multi-AZ Deployments
skills.description: Understand how to design for high availability and disaster recovery using multi-region and multi-availability zone deployments.

scenario.title: Designing a Global Service with Multi-Region Deployment

skills.title: Disaster Recovery Strategies
skills.description: Explore various disaster recovery strategies (e.g., backup and restore, pilot light, warm standby) and their trade-offs.

scenario.title: Developing a DR Plan for a Critical Database

skills.title: Infrastructure as Code (IaC) Principles (conceptual)
skills.description: Get a conceptual understanding of Infrastructure as Code (IaC) for automating infrastructure provisioning and management.

scenario.title: Automating Environment Setup with IaC

skills.title: Cost Optimization in Cloud (conceptual)
skills.description: Understand key principles and strategies for optimizing cloud infrastructure costs without sacrificing performance or reliability.

scenario.title: Optimizing Cloud Spend for a Growing Application

milestones.label: L6
milestones.identity_statement: You optimize system performance at a granular level and translate high-level designs into detailed technical specifications.

modules.title: Detailed API Design
modules.description: Master the art of designing clean, efficient, and maintainable APIs, focusing on best practices and versioning.

skills.title: REST API Best Practices
skills.description: Learn advanced best practices for designing truly RESTful and user-friendly APIs.

scenario.title: Refactoring a Suboptimal REST API Design

skills.title: API Versioning Strategies
skills.description: Understand different API versioning approaches (e.g., URL, header, media type) and their pros and cons.

scenario.title: Planning an API Version Upgrade

skills.title: GraphQL Introduction (conceptual)
skills.description: Get a conceptual overview of GraphQL as an alternative API query language for flexible data fetching.

scenario.title: Deciding Between REST and GraphQL for a New Feature

skills.title: API Documentation (OpenAPI/Swagger)
skills.description: Learn the importance of API documentation and how to use tools like OpenAPI/Swagger for clear specifications.

scenario.title: Creating OpenAPI Specification for an Existing API

modules.title: Optimizing Data Access
modules.description: Deep dive into database schema design, indexing, and query optimization for high-performance applications.

skills.title: Advanced SQL Query Optimization
skills.description: Master techniques for writing and optimizing complex SQL queries for maximum performance.

scenario.title: Optimizing a Slow Reporting Query

skills.title: Indexing Strategies
skills.description: Learn various indexing techniques and how to choose the right indexes for different query patterns.

scenario.title: Designing Indexes for a User Search Feature

skills.title: Database Schema Refactoring
skills.description: Understand how to safely refactor and evolve database schemas in production environments.

scenario.title: Performing a Zero-Downtime Schema Migration

skills.title: ORM Performance Considerations
skills.description: Learn how to use ORMs effectively while avoiding common performance pitfalls.

scenario.title: Improving Performance of a Spring Data JPA Repository

modules.title: Managing Concurrent Operations
modules.description: Understand and implement concurrent programming patterns to build highly responsive and efficient backend services.

skills.title: Concurrency vs. Parallelism
skills.description: Clearly differentiate between concurrency and parallelism and their application in software design.

scenario.title: Designing a Concurrent Task Executor

skills.title: Thread Pools & Executors
skills.description: Learn to effectively manage threads using thread pools and executor services for optimal resource utilization.

scenario.title: Configuring a Thread Pool for a Web Server

skills.title: Locks, Semaphores & Mutexes
skills.description: Master synchronization primitives like locks, semaphores, and mutexes to prevent race conditions in concurrent code.

scenario.title: Implementing a Thread-Safe Counter

skills.title: Non-Blocking I/O (NIO)
skills.description: Understand Non-Blocking I/O (NIO) and its benefits for building highly scalable and concurrent network applications.

scenario.title: Designing a High-Performance Chat Server with NIO

milestones.label: L7
milestones.identity_statement: You confidently lead complex system design initiatives and excel in senior-level architectural discussions.

modules.title: Advanced System Design Case Studies
modules.description: Analyze and design solutions for complex, real-world system design problems, applying all learned principles.

skills.title: Design a URL Shortener
skills.description: Design a highly scalable and available URL shortening service, considering various constraints.

scenario.title: Designing a Distributed ID Generator for URL Shortener

skills.title: Design a Chat System
skills.description: Design a real-time chat application, considering aspects like message delivery, presence, and scalability.

scenario.title: Designing Message Delivery Guarantees for a Chat App

skills.title: Design a News Feed System
skills.description: Design a scalable news feed system, addressing fan-out strategies and content delivery.

scenario.title: Optimizing Fan-out for a High-Volume News Feed

skills.title: Design a Distributed Cache
skills.description: Design a robust and scalable distributed caching system for various use cases.

scenario.title: Implementing Cache Invalidation Strategies

modules.title: Leading Design & Documentation
modules.description: Develop skills in leading technical discussions, making architectural decisions, and creating comprehensive design documents.

skills.title: Technical Design Document Creation
skills.description: Master the art of writing clear, concise, and comprehensive technical design documents (TDDs).

scenario.title: Writing a TDD for a New Microservice

skills.title: Presenting Architectural Decisions
skills.description: Develop strong communication skills to effectively present and justify architectural decisions to stakeholders.

scenario.title: Presenting a System Design Proposal to a Review Board

skills.title: Evaluating Design Alternatives
skills.description: Learn systematic approaches to evaluate different architectural alternatives and make informed choices.

scenario.title: Comparing Two Database Solutions for a New Project

skills.title: Mentoring Junior Engineers (conceptual)
skills.description: Understand the principles of technical mentorship and how to guide junior engineers in their growth.

scenario.title: Guiding a Junior Engineer Through a Design Problem

modules.title: Acing Senior Backend Interviews
modules.description: Practice and refine your system design interview skills through mock interviews and advanced problem-solving.

skills.title: Behavioral Interview Preparation
skills.description: Prepare for behavioral questions, focusing on leadership, conflict resolution, and project ownership.

scenario.title: Practicing STAR Method for Leadership Scenarios

skills.title: Advanced System Design Mock Interview 1
skills.description: Participate in a full-length mock system design interview, receiving detailed feedback on your approach.

video.title: Mock Interview: Designing a Ride-Sharing App

scenario.title: Post-Interview Analysis: Ride-Sharing App Design

skills.title: Advanced System Design Mock Interview 2
skills.description: Engage in another challenging mock interview to solidify your system design skills and confidence.

video.title: Mock Interview: Designing a Video Streaming Service

scenario.title: Post-Interview Analysis: Video Streaming Design

skills.title: Post-Interview Feedback & Iteration
skills.description: Learn to effectively process interview feedback and iterate on your design and communication skills.

scenario.title: Refining a System Design Based on Feedback
